name: Requests Response
description: Structure documentation for the requests.Response object returned by all HTTP method calls in the Python Requests library.

fields.name: status_code
fields.description: HTTP status code of the response (e.g., 200, 201, 404, 500).

fields.name: ok
fields.description: True if status_code is less than 400.

fields.name: encoding
fields.description: Encoding used to decode response.text. Guessed from Content-Type.

fields.name: text
fields.description: Response body decoded as a Unicode string.

fields.name: json()
fields.description: Method that deserializes the JSON response body. Raises ValueError if response is not JSON.

fields.name: elapsed
fields.description: Time elapsed between sending the request and receiving the last byte.

fields.name: history
fields.description: List of Responses from redirect chain, oldest to newest.

fields.name: cookies
fields.description: Cookies the server set in the response.

fields.name: request
fields.description: The PreparedRequest that was sent to produce this response.
